name: codex-cc-plugin
description: Use Claude Code from Codex to review code or delegate tasks with Claude CLI.

scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run format:check && bun run test
scripts.build:cli: mkdir -p dist && bun run build:cli:darwin-arm64 && bun run build:cli:darwin-x64 && bun run build:cli:linux-arm64 && bun run build:cli:linux-x64
scripts.release:dry-run: bun run check && bun run build:cli
scripts.release:patch: bun run check && npm version patch -m "release: v%s" && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: bun run check && npm version minor -m "release: v%s" && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:major: bun run check && npm version major -m "release: v%s" && git push --follow-tags
